name: File Kitty
subtitle: A content management and tracking tool for people with busy brains.
description: Manage, track and communicate content delivery and ingestion, from studio to screen. Weekly, monthly and annual licenses available.

name: LTCue
subtitle: Check your sync against reference audio or other videos.
description: Compare your video with embedded audio against reference audio, or against other videos to establish timecode offset - either absolute or relative.
